title: Mixed Juice
description: The latest version of mixed fruit juice master is fresh and crisp. You can complete various operations with your fingers and enjoy the fun of your fingertips. It will be very interesting. Players will have their own tools here to make different flavors of fruit juice.
instructions: With your hands squeeze the fruit into the juicer Be careful not to reach too far or you could easily get hurt Enough fruit is mixed and juiced to produce fruit teas of different colors and flavors
